notes: Zapier polls the Dynamics 365 Web API. In OpenFn, the cron pattern uses an OData $filter on modifiedon or createdon. (Dynamics also supports server-side webhook plugins, but Zapier does not use them.)

triggers.name: New Account
triggers.description: Fires when a new account is created.

triggers.name: New Contact
triggers.description: Fires when a new contact is created.

triggers.name: New Lead
triggers.description: Fires when a new lead is created.

triggers.name: New Opportunity
triggers.description: Fires when a new opportunity is created.

triggers.name: New Order
triggers.description: Fires when a new order (salesorder) is created.

triggers.name: New Record
triggers.description: Fires when a new record of a specified entity is created.

triggers.name: Updated Order
triggers.description: Fires when an order is updated.

triggers.name: Updated Record
triggers.description: Fires when a record of a specified entity is updated.
